name: Buttermilk Pancakes for Two
recipeIngredient: Buttermilk to make 2 cups of Batter
recipeInstructions:
Salt and sugar can be adjusted to personal tastes.
Combine the dry ingredients in a bowl. Add the egg and 1/2 cup of buttermilk. Incorporate the melted butter. Mix until just combined, creating a slightly lumpy batter. Use enough buttermilk to achieve a total of 2 cups of batter, or thinner if desired. Cook on a lightly greased griddle as usual. Serve with maple syrup and butter.
